mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forumpost (userId, title, content, createTime, updateTime) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: update forumpost set likeCount = likeCount + 1 where id = #{id} and status = 1
mapper.select:
select * from forumpost
title like concat('%',#{title},'%')
SELECT * FROM forumpost WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1

select * from forumpost
status = 1
and title like concat('%',#{title},'%')
